DEPT 03. JUDGE FRANCIS MCKEON, PR0-TEM. CSR: BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. PLTFF TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINMAN, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 TURK ST, 	17, STAYED UNTIL OCT-25-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTION UNTIL 25-OCT-94; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY. FEES; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
